ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Raymond Herbert Levy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cristeta Valdez, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Aurora Sison as follows:
Principal $22,611.87
Interest $2,068.13
Costs $320.00
Judgment signed in open court.
